postReview.title: Portugal 5-2 Denmark (aet, 5-3 agg): Trincao leads hosts to Nations League semi-finals
postReview.description: Francisco Trincao scored twice to help Portugal to a frenzied 5-2 win over Denmark in the second leg of the Nations League quarter-finals.

preReview.title: Ronaldo: There is no need for Portugal to be nervous
preReview.description: Cristiano Ronaldo says there is tension around Portugal's camp, but does not see a need to be nervous ahead of Sunday's clash with Denmark.
